reviews.review_description: The demo sold me. Super fun. Super well designed game and I'm gonna definitely share this one first with my family and friends when they come over.
Just played this Demo on my Samsung S6 and really enjoyed it...disappointed that I can't purchase the full version as it says DEVICE NOT SUPPORTED why can I play the demo?
It shows the game's 1st stage, but not other game modes. It should give a taste of the rest of the game.
when i play this game , it made my phone warm, and notice me the phone must remove and cool down

reviews.review_title: You can't fail: give it a try!
reviews.review_description: This is a very polished game/demo. It can be fun for you, but  it's not my cup of tea (at least from what I saw).

This is one of the best games i played on the quest. It is not very difficult but it is al lot of fun to play. Tracking is amazingly acurate much better then other games. And the price for this game is spot on i would even have payed a little more. Very well build game.
The mini-game in this demo is probably my least favorite in the game. Not to say it isn't fun, in fact it's great. I'm just saying that the rest of the game is even better.

Download these apps to get controller to work the setup wizard uninstall the old one and press done not open after reinstall go to home and find gear VR launcher go to setting manage controllers and pair the controller!!

Nice and cool game , but it is very very short , it is only one step !      I asked developer please let to play half of the game as demo and next half for buy.  Thanks for its designers ..........hurrrraaaa

As a pre-installed title for the Oculus Go, this is essentially a free preview for the full priced game. I appreciate that it let you fully play the first mini-game, and is something you could periodically come back to for a better score. Many of these types of demos/previews would rather pull the rug out from underneath you halfway through. So there’s value there. Did it sell me on the full game? No, but I’m probably not the target demographic, nor do I hold any ill will toward the game. It’s not my cup of tea, but that doesn’t make it a bad game. It actually seems to be endearing and well-made. Overall, I consider it a successful demo, even if it didn’t convert me.
